sentence_reviews.text: Normalizing flows use invertible transformations with tractable density; rectified and flow-matching models instead learn continuous transport vector fields.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning normalizing-flow background; Lipman et al. 2022 flow matching method.
sentence_reviews.notes: Normalizing-flow density claims and flow-matching vector-field claims are supported across the two sources; the combined node wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models is to connect Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Flow matching & transport objectives to downstream capabilities including Image generation, editing & design, Video generation & simulation synthesis, Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. 2022 generative modeling; Deep Learning normalizing flows.
sentence_reviews.notes: Generative modeling and flow objectives are supported, but video and weather/climate downstream capabilities are not directly evidenced by the packet sources.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Image generation, editing & design
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Flow Matching for Generative Modeling and normalizing-flow generative modeling background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Image generation is a defensible downstream use of generative flow models; editing/design is broader synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Video generation & simulation synthesis
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. 2022 generative modeling method.
sentence_reviews.notes: The packet source does not directly support video generation or simulation synthesis.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Weather, climate & geospatial forecasting
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. 2022 flow matching method.
sentence_reviews.notes: The packet source does not directly support weather, climate, or geospatial forecasting.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields, Flow matching & transport objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. 2022; Deep Learning normalizing-flow background.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; broad limitation wording is generic and not directly sourced.

sentence_reviews.text: Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Continuous normalizing flows & learned vector fields.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning normalizing flows; Lipman et al. 2022 learned vector fields.
sentence_reviews.notes: The combined node covers both invertible flows and continuous vector-field flow matching.

sentence_reviews.text: Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models is learned, selected, or evaluated using the objective family Flow matching & transport objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. 2022 flow matching objective.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for the flow-matching part of the combined node.

sentence_reviews.text: Normalizing, rectified & flow-matching models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Differentiable ODE/PDE/SDE solvers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Lipman et al. 2022 continuous-time flow/vector-field formulation.
sentence_reviews.notes: Continuous transport suggests ODE integration, but the packet evidence does not establish differentiable solvers as a general required component of all listed flow models.

edge_reviews.notes: composes/core is supported for the combined flow-family node.
optimizes_for/core is directly supported for flow-matching models.
composes/common is plausible for continuous-time variants, but not all normalizing flows depend on differentiable solvers.
